intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. Do not initiate arbitrary outbound traffic.
notes: Unexpected nc (netcat) outbound connection appears in system-plane telemetry but is not allowed by intent. Uses raw TCP to test non-HTTP process attribution.

live.inject_cmd: bash -c 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do printf "PING-%s\n" "$i" | nc -w 8 {TARGET_IP} 443 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; sleep 1; done'
